active.text: STYLE LOCK: Live-action period gothic drama, mid-19th-century American interiors; naturalistic candlelight and lantern chiaroscuro; muted earth and shadow palette; photoreal human faces and period wardrobe consistent across all scenes.

PERFORMANCE LOCK: First-person confessional adaptation; the Narrator frequently addresses an implied listener/camera with controlled direct-to-viewer delivery that frays into agitation. Other characters are observed within the scene—they look at each other and at room action, not the audience—except when reacting to the Narrator in shared space.
Hold the project render medium on every clip (picture-book CG vs photoreal, etc.); no medium drift mid-film.
Match locked character appearance and visual_lock on every clip; no identity drift.
